subtitle: Your Paws are votes. At the end of the period the charity pool is split between shelters in proportion to the votes.
insufficientMessage: You have {{have}} Paws, but {{need}} are needed
voteThanksMessage: Your vote is counted: {{amount}} Paws for "{{shelter}}". At the end of the period the pool is split between shelters in proportion to votes. Balance: {{balance}} Paws
poolInfo: Your Paws are votes: they set each shelter's share of the period's charity pool — they don't buy a fixed amount. The larger a shelter's share of votes, the larger its share of the pool.
